sql_array: CREATE TABLE bit_test (id Int32, original_value Int32, rotated_value Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO bit_test (id, original_value, rotated_value) VALUES (1, 8, bitRotateRight(8, 2));
INSERT INTO bit_test (id, original_value, rotated_value) VALUES (2, 32, bitRotateRight(32, 3));
UPDATE bit_test SET rotated_value = bitRotateRight(original_value, 1) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, original_value, rotated_value FROM bit_test WHERE rotated_value = bitRotateRight(16, 4);
